definition: to heat and then slowly cool (metal or glass) to toughen it
The blacksmith will anneal the steel to reduce its brittleness.
To make a regular puffing sound, like a steam engine.
The old train began to chuff slowly out of the station.
to inscribe or display a design on something
The team's logo was emblazoned on their new jerseys.
To bind someone by an agreement as an apprentice or laborer
Many immigrants were indentured servants in the colonies.
The strong winds threatened to rive the old flag.
to sparkle; to emit flashes of light; to be brilliant and exciting
Her wit and charm scintillated throughout the evening.
To strike with a firm blow; to affect suddenly and powerfully
The hero vowed to smite his enemies.
